title: NEO 4.0 MASTER_CHECKPOINT
_status: INSTALLED 4.0-P3-A (from the KEPT 4.0 Session-0 draft). Live spine schema. RECONCILES WITH the live neo:checkpoint spine schema — this is a program-scope SUPERSET for the master orchestrator, NOT a fork. It EMBEDS the live checkpoint shape (by $ref) under `session_checkpoint` and adds only program-orchestration fields.
_reconcile: The live neo:checkpoint (.neo/schema/checkpoint.schema.json) stays the per-session resumability record, written by the governor. MASTER_CHECKPOINT is the orchestrator's program-level state. It does not redefine checkpoint fields; it references them via $ref. If a future build slice prefers to keep them wholly separate files, that is acceptable — the requirement is: reuse, do not contradict.

session_checkpoint.description: The live neo:checkpoint record (session_id, current_task, progress, next_step, model_map, spend_so_far, changed_files_baseline, updated_at). Reused by $ref, not redefined. See .neo/schema/checkpoint.schema.json for the authoritative field spec.

open_deferrals.description: Typed deferrals WITH EXPIRY (D9). An expired deferral is a stop/rollover trigger.

orchestration_mode.description: REQUIRED (P0.1/F1): every checkpoint MUST assert this; a checkpoint with no mode is now invalid, so 'disabled by construction' cannot be sidestepped by omission. ONLY 'serial' is valid in this design. 'concurrent' is DESIGNED-BUT-DISABLED (A5): not a permitted enum value until S6->SHIP + the one-time human enable gate. Fail-closed by construction.
